title: Komárno、Nitra Region — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Komárno、Nitra Regionの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

KomárnoはNitra Regionにある人口33,751の都市です。A historic town on the Danube at the Hungarian border, known for its Hungarian cultural heritage, the Komárno Fortress system, and its river port.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
